## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Outset and GrowthX to discuss content creation progress and strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/JQqV88BBrsvrXA8MZx3JCxiAtwPGcqss?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Mariana published new specialty articles and curated a list of credible, non-AI resources for references](https://fathom.video/share/JQqV88BBrsvrXA8MZx3JCxiAtwPGcqss?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)
  - [Content impressions are increasing, but clicks are lagging due to recent publication](https://fathom.video/share/JQqV88BBrsvrXA8MZx3JCxiAtwPGcqss?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Image sourcing for articles needs improvement, balancing between Outset's photos and stock images](https://fathom.video/share/JQqV88BBrsvrXA8MZx3JCxiAtwPGcqss?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Lawson to review pediatrics and neurosurgery guides before further content creation](https://fathom.video/share/JQqV88BBrsvrXA8MZx3JCxiAtwPGcqss?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)

## Topics

### New Content and Resources

  - [Mariana published new specialty articles for review](https://fathom.video/share/JQqV88BBrsvrXA8MZx3JCxiAtwPGcqss?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)
  - [Curated list of credible resources (CDC, labor statistics, nurse.org, NIH, AAMC) for article references](https://fathom.video/share/JQqV88BBrsvrXA8MZx3JCxiAtwPGcqss?tab=summary&timestamp=57.0)
  - [AI-generated content to be supplemented with manually added references initially](https://fathom.video/share/JQqV88BBrsvrXA8MZx3JCxiAtwPGcqss?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [As more articles are published, references will be automatically included from existing content](https://fathom.video/share/JQqV88BBrsvrXA8MZx3JCxiAtwPGcqss?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)

### Content Performance

  - [Impressions for new articles are increasing](https://fathom.video/share/JQqV88BBrsvrXA8MZx3JCxiAtwPGcqss?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Click-through rates are lower due to recent publication (4 articles in the past two days)](https://fathom.video/share/JQqV88BBrsvrXA8MZx3JCxiAtwPGcqss?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Articles typically take time to propagate and improve search rankings (starting around 45th position)](https://fathom.video/share/JQqV88BBrsvrXA8MZx3JCxiAtwPGcqss?tab=summary&timestamp=45.0)
  - [Content primarily accessed through Google searches rather than website navigation](https://fathom.video/share/JQqV88BBrsvrXA8MZx3JCxiAtwPGcqss?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)

### Website Organization

  - [Articles categorized under "Medical Careers" and "Medical Programs"](https://fathom.video/share/JQqV88BBrsvrXA8MZx3JCxiAtwPGcqss?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Potential need to improve blog organization for easier article discovery](https://fathom.video/share/JQqV88BBrsvrXA8MZx3JCxiAtwPGcqss?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)

### Image Usage in Articles

  - [Current Outset photos don't always fit article themes (e.g., camp photos vs. doctor images)](https://fathom.video/share/JQqV88BBrsvrXA8MZx3JCxiAtwPGcqss?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
  - [Limited variety of images available from Outset](https://fathom.video/share/JQqV88BBrsvrXA8MZx3JCxiAtwPGcqss?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [Suggestion to use stock images for specific topics (e.g., neurosurgery)](https://fathom.video/share/JQqV88BBrsvrXA8MZx3JCxiAtwPGcqss?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [Aim to maintain consistent color scheme and style when mixing stock and Outset photos](https://fathom.video/share/JQqV88BBrsvrXA8MZx3JCxiAtwPGcqss?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [Ideal to include an image every \~1700 words to break up text](https://fathom.video/share/JQqV88BBrsvrXA8MZx3JCxiAtwPGcqss?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Content Review Process

  - [Lawson to review pediatrics and neurosurgery guides](https://fathom.video/share/JQqV88BBrsvrXA8MZx3JCxiAtwPGcqss?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [Feedback to be provided via comments in the shared documents](https://fathom.video/share/JQqV88BBrsvrXA8MZx3JCxiAtwPGcqss?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Lawson to review and provide feedback on pediatrics and neurosurgery guides](https://fathom.video/share/JQqV88BBrsvrXA8MZx3JCxiAtwPGcqss?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [Mariana to start working on guide verticals after receiving feedback](https://fathom.video/share/JQqV88BBrsvrXA8MZx3JCxiAtwPGcqss?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [Source appropriate stock images to complement Outset's photos in articles](https://fathom.video/share/JQqV88BBrsvrXA8MZx3JCxiAtwPGcqss?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [Continue monitoring content performance and adjust strategy as needed](https://fathom.video/share/JQqV88BBrsvrXA8MZx3JCxiAtwPGcqss?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Explore options for better blog organization to improve article discoverability](https://fathom.video/share/JQqV88BBrsvrXA8MZx3JCxiAtwPGcqss?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
